name: Paw Performance Polo-XXL Men Blue
description: Go big on comfort and even bigger on pet love with this men’s XXL-fit polo in a timeless blue tone. Crafted from a soft, breathable cotton-poly blend, it features a clean embroidered paw print that combines both cat and dog paws — the perfect emblem for proud pet dads. Size: XXL (Men’s Fit) Color: Blue Material: Durable cotton-poly blend for all-day comfort Design: Embroidered paw print representing both cat and dog companionship Fit: Roomy and relaxed XXL men’s cut with a structured collar and two-button placket Care: Machine washable for easy, everyday wear Whether you're heading out or hanging with your furry friend, this polo is a simple, stylish way to wear your heart on your sleeve. .
